name: scaffold-v2
description: Vue 3 + Element Plus + FastAPI scaffold (project-workflow v2 reference impl)

scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && pnpm --prefix frontend install && pnpm check:env && docker compose build
scripts.dev: pnpm check:env && pnpm dev:down && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:be" "pnpm fe:dev"
scripts.dev:build: pnpm check:env && pnpm dev:down && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "docker compose up --build" "pnpm fe:dev"
scripts.be:lint: docker compose exec backend uv run ruff check --fix src tests
scripts.be:format: docker compose exec backend uv run ruff format src tests
scripts.be:test: docker compose exec backend uv run pytest
scripts.be:test:cov: docker compose exec backend uv run pytest --cov=src --cov-report=term-missing
scripts.be:migrate:make: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.be:migrate:up: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.be:migrate:down: docker compose exec backend uv run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.be:add: docker compose exec backend uv add
scripts.check: pnpm be:lint && pnpm be:test && pnpm fe:typecheck && pnpm fe:lint
